title: Phenomenon 19
wikitext:
{{DISPLAYTITLE: Phenomenon 19: "Reimann's Mess"}}__notoc__ {{Background|file=Zeta function.png}}
Notice

As of January 19th, 2030, the last Phenomenon 19 event was May 10th, 2026, soon after the Riemann hypothesis was disproved (details contained in classified reports Zeta-a 1-3). As such, it has been considered "neutralized." This page is an archived excerpt 109, the last edit before the said date. [[File:Meg.png|300px]]
{{VoidedTheme}} {{Phenomenon Class|frequency=0?|effectiveness=4|danger=2}} ==I.Overview== {{Simple Image Block|image=Reimann Hypothesis.png|caption=Fig. 1.1 The Zeta function spiral|align=right}} Phenomenon 19, also known as "Reimann's Mess," affects the first 168 regular and prime-numbered level pairs (e.g Level 3 and Level 5) as constituted by [[Phenomenon 13|The Casper-Bray Numbering System]]. The phenomenon is characterized by the swap between parts of an aforementioned prime-numbered level and a regular level. Despite each instance of phenomenon 19 being unique, instances resemble the spiral of the "zeta function," as formulated by the Riemann hypothesis, which proposes that said zeta function, under a set of mathematical operations, predicts whether a number is prime. The levels at which a Phenomenon 19 event goes from is in order from the first level pair to the 168th level pair, which is the last level pair before 1000, the intervals of time between events of the phenomenon range from a month to a year. During the phenomenon, effects take a few hours to fully manifest and dissipate before events are "covered up," returning to pre-phenomenon state. Due to damage sustained at the level and upticks in adverse phenomena (e.g., Phenomenon 11), any level affected by Phenomenon 19 becomes untraversable. When 2 levels of different heights intersect, both levels will expand or contract to reach the same heightAlso known as a 'height discontinuity.. If the height difference is severe enough, (e.g when an outdoor level interacts with an indoor level), it creates rips leading to [[The Void]]. As such, these properties render most survival strategies in other phenomena useless, so most wanderers stay in place until it subsides. ==II.Interactions with Phenomenon and Special properties== Because of complications when two levels with conflicting phenomena intersect, Phenomenon 19 has adapted to modyfy. For example, when a host level has [[Phenomenon 15]] Also known as 'Alone', Phenomenon 15 occurs when wanderers are alone in a level, regardless of how many people are in it., it has adapted so that upon Phenomenon 15, all individuals near the wanderer will no-clip out of existence, as the spiral splits into every variation of the host level. There are cases where two wanderers no-clip into each other, usually resulting in death. {{Simple Image Block|image=Zeta function.png|caption=Fig. 2.1 The zeta function distortion, the distortion inside the graph represents the non-Euclidean geometry with 1 distorted "square" equal to ten square kilometers. |align=left}} Similarly, when a level with [[Phenomenon 14]] Also known as Shifting Geometry, Phenomenon 14 is when non-Euclidean geometries take a "superposition" of forms.intersects with Euclidean geometries, both levels either collapse into a flat state or the state shown in Figure 2. In this state, the spiral collapses into what appears to be a straight line relative to an outside perspective. When the geometry changes to said state, it takes ~2 hours to a day for the full effect to start and fade back into phenomenon 14. To continue, [[Phenomenon 11]]Phenomenon 11 is when nearby physical laws start to break down. is much stronger during Phenomenon 19, with it being especially violent and unstable when the phenomenon starts to take shape. This is a consequence of other laws taking shape to allow both levels to intersect; this is a subject for debate, as it implies that Phenomenon 19 doesn't belong in physical laws, but it can also be implied that it does. It is usually used as a warning sign, as there is a sharp increase in events during the days before the effect, so no-travel alerts are placed in the days after for the same reason. ==III.Theories== |-|The Seneca Theory= The first theory comes from Julian Seneca's book (see IV.1, Discovery), and we list it here for historical reasons. It states that the phenomenon is a way to order levels and "fasten" them into a specific place, while we now know that levels are numbered by level keys. It's considered historically impressive, as it's one of the first cases of ordering levels. Today, a modern mathematical variation ties it to level keys, with it stating that each level itself has a "frequency" and, as it moves through the void, Phenomenon 19 is a "force" that moves primes together. This theory is also still considered incorrect by most scholars, as there is no r proof that level key frequencies extend beyond the host levels themselves. |-|The Hailey-Ceaser Theory= Formed by Kauer researchers James Ceaser and Evylin Hailey, it states that Phenomenon 19 is a manifestation of belief in the Riemann hypothesis and in the ordering of primes. The achospic plane from the elevated perception of primes made the backrooms show the "solution" of how they intersect. However, many have stated that Phenomenon 19 is a manifestation of the belief in the Riemann hypothesis and have stated that the opposite could be true, with phenomenon 19 showing how "unnatural" the Reinmann hypothesis is, citing both the possible unnaturalness of phenomenon 19. |-| The Oscillation theory= A group of amateur researchers, mainly consisting of math enthusiasts and college students, formed the theory that backrooms levels have string-like properties and oscillate, like quantum strings string theory states particles are one-dimensional strings vibrating in many dimensions forming particles and spacetime., and similarly to string theory, oscillate with semi-accordance to the Reinman hypothesis. The laws of physics in the backrooms have then been modified in a way so energy can be created, allowing said level strings to move. It is important to note that the group is now using this as a stepping stone for a new backrooms theory. ==IV.Discovery and Survival Guide== ===IV.1 Discovery=== Instances of Phenomenon 19 go all the way back to [[Entity 70|'' Homo Callidus'']] cave paintings. Still, the first officially documented case was from the backrooms science textbook, "Studium Limencologiae Mathematicae" (The study of mathematical liminocology The formal name of backrooms science at the time was referred to as ''Liminocology''. ) from 197 A.D by Julian Seneca. The modern interpretation of the phenomenon was in the 1900s, when a copy of Riemann's 1859 paper made it into the backrooms. Phenomenon 19 also plays a part in level discovery due to being a safer, more direct gateway when other methods of transportation are tedious. ===IV.2 Survival Guide=== *Don't approach levels that have had a recent Phenomenon 19 event. *If you are a victim of a height discontinuity, stay in place until it's over. *If a violent and quick effect of Phenomenon 11 is happening, a Phenomenon 19 event will occur. *If your teammates seem to disappear, place markers while exploring so when the events are over, there will be a window where your teammates can find you. *If inside a base, huddle up with teammates for extra safety. {{Footnotes}} {{M.E.G Notice|notice=MEG clearance 5 in either mathematical anomalies and/or Phenomenon 19 to view document.|reason= Sensitive data}} {{DatabaseLoginForm|{{collapse|num=1|initial=Open file name >>"reports Zeta-A 1-3"|body=

Announcement from the meg from your specialty (PHENOMENON 19)! May 1st, 2026, Report 1 We recently found a discontinuity while analyzing a Phenomenon 19 event in Levels 5 and 11; we now clipped into a group of hazardous spaces. In the areas we designated as Zeta-Alpha, we note many regions within Zeta-Alpha, designated with a number at the end. These areas resemble normal levels and have properties consistent with them; each extends infinitely in 3D space. We were unable to determine their levels because we have not found any level keys for the area, or the level keys we DID find didn't have any radio signal. Between areas are these jagged, corrupted fragments of [[The Broken]] or rips to The Void. Each in intricate shapes and dots, the Achospic Plane is also stronger here, with larger amounts of radiation and [[Phenomenon 9]]. There's a surreal vibe around it. May 3rd, 2026, Report 2 We have found a new spot within Zeta-12, which we'll call Zeta-A. It is a 1x1x1 kilometer area, and it looks like one of the most unstable areas we have come across; many objects clip into each other like in [[The Broken]], though not actually in The Broken. We've lost a good amount to people who accidentally no-clipped or get torn by tidal forces. It also seems like physics is different here, so we'll need to make a makeshift detector. May 9th, 2026, Report 3 Good news! We have used a few objects to make a detector and used it in Zeta-A. As we have seen, the Casimir Effect seems to be slightly different here, with the idea of mass and spacetime changing, meaning that most conservation laws no longer apply in small areas. However, calculations seem to predict the correct answer if and only if the Riemann Hypothesis is false! New areas with different laws of physics take shape as particles. When "tuned" to false areas, they find loopholes that make them more stable. If we were on Earth, we would win the millennium prize. Welp. Our mathematicians are currently formulating a paper about our discoveries. May 10th, 2026 When we woke up today, something odd happened: all of us violently and spontaneously no-clipped into either Level 5 or Level 11. Luckily, a base is near so that we can get help for our crew. We have published our findings on [[Phenomenon 2|Back-net]]. We think the Achospic energy sank the Higgs Field into a lower energy state, destroying the Zeta Alpha area entirely.
{{collapse|num=3|initial=The Riemannian theories of the infinity have gone.|final=Zeta, has fallen.|body= false f a l s e false? In the beginning, man has always sought to classify, to learn, to know as much as the world knows itself. One of which was mathematics, the relations of numbers with other numbers. It was at first a shortcut to know the optimal land count or find how many things can fit in a box, each trivial thing. But it spread. Spread into every tiny thing inside the human mind, art, science, and engineering, all explained in rigorous, airtight writing. It was the answer. "We will know, we MUST know." We looked at primes, a mystery longing for truth over thousands of years. We sought the Riemann Hypothesis, a seemingly perfect solution, but it wasn't proven. So we tried, tried to prove it. But we couldn't. When people's thoughts, their manifestations, were of such power that they altered the world to form the backrooms, it was there too. But when Riemann's theories came along, there was a problem. You see, the backrooms still rely on an objective truth based on mathematical ideas, and in our thoughts, we held out hope that it was true. But it wasn't. Any system or "code" with incorrect data cannot handle it, so it manifests itself in other ways. It, as a virus, caused chaos, switching levels back and forth, making a mess of order, only to be stabilized when the force of the backrooms eventually overcame chaos. Truth is no longer certain. Primes, the universe, the backrooms, and everything are unsolvable. Math is incomplete. Math is dead. {{Collapse|num=2|initial=As you peer into the mathematical fog.|final=It also peers back at you.|body=
